name: medical practice managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical practice managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate matching of patient visits to insurance payments causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated billing reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate matching of patient visits to insurance payments
features: manual entry of patient visit data
manual entry of insurance payment data
